auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Zyte API key used as the Basic Auth username for the Zyte Extraction API. Create or copy it from the Zyte API access page: https://app.zyte.com/o/zyte-api/api-access

actions.name: extract_article
actions.description: Extract article data from one public URL with Zyte API.

url.description: The absolute public HTTP or HTTPS URL to extract data from with Zyte API.

ipType.description: The IP type Zyte API should use for the request.

extractFrom.description: The source Zyte API should use for automatic extraction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting article data with Zyte API.

url.description: The URL Zyte API extracted data from. It may differ from the input URL.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code retrieved from the target page.

article.description: The article data returned by Zyte API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for extracting article data with Zyte API.

actions.name: extract_page_content
actions.description: Extract generic page content data from one public URL with Zyte API.

url.description: The absolute public HTTP or HTTPS URL to extract data from with Zyte API.

ipType.description: The IP type Zyte API should use for the request.

extractFrom.description: The source Zyte API should use for automatic extraction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting page content data with Zyte API.

url.description: The URL Zyte API extracted data from. It may differ from the input URL.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code retrieved from the target page.

pageContent.description: The page content data returned by Zyte API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for extracting page content data with Zyte API.

actions.name: extract_product
actions.description: Extract product data from one public URL with Zyte API.

url.description: The absolute public HTTP or HTTPS URL to extract data from with Zyte API.

ipType.description: The IP type Zyte API should use for the request.

extractFrom.description: The source Zyte API should use for automatic extraction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting product data with Zyte API.

url.description: The URL Zyte API extracted data from. It may differ from the input URL.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code retrieved from the target page.

product.description: The product data returned by Zyte API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for extracting product data with Zyte API.

actions.name: fetch_browser_html
actions.description: Fetch browser-rendered HTML for one public URL with Zyte API.

url.description: The absolute public HTTP or HTTPS URL to extract data from with Zyte API.

ipType.description: The IP type Zyte API should use for the request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching browser-rendered HTML with Zyte API.

url.description: The URL Zyte API extracted data from. It may differ from the input URL.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code retrieved from the target page.

browserHtml.description: The browser-rendered HTML returned by Zyte API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching browser-rendered HTML with Zyte API.
